ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contrib_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "fam" TEXT /* Family identifier */,
  "contrib" TEXT /* Contributor's name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "fec_occ_emp" TEXT /* Occupation */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Organization name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name for sorting and search */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contrib_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contrib_id" TEXT /* Reference to the contributor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign receiving the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., individual, organizational) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contrib_id FOREIGN KEY ("contrib_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contrib_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the political campaign */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "campaign_manager" TEXT /* Name of the campaign manager */,
  "campaign_treasury" REAL /* Total treasury of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, compliance officer) */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contribution */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution status was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id")
)
column_names: Last name for sorting and search
Reference to the campaign receiving the contribution
Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check)
Role of the user (e.g., manager, compliance officer)
Reference to the campaign the user is associated with
Unique identifier for each tracking entry
Date the contribution status was updated
Reference to the user who updated the status
